creator: pete@twisted.org.uk
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #51)

I followed the thread, and I must admit that I actually laughed out loud when I got to the end and saw the patch was a one-liner! Ah, yes, definitely having that as an attachment must have been awful for them to deal with :-)

I once submitted some code to the GNU project - which actually involved signing paper forms and sending them off to a layers office in Boston (the USA one). Which was astonishing - had to list every file I modified!

So, I sympathise with you...
